sideQuests.title: Recover the Missing Star Charts
sideQuests.description: Venture into the ruined cathedral archives beneath Millhaven to recover ancient star charts that predate the Observatory's records. These charts may reveal the pattern behind Velkor Wrenn's star selections and help locate the Eternal Circle's sanctum.
